data.title: Global Radioligand Therapy (RLT) Market expected to reach US$10.9 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 13.2% from 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of September 13, 2025, the worldwide market for Radioligand Therapy (RLT) experienced significant growth. Starting at $2.36 billion in 2024, it rose to $3.15 billion in 2025. Projections indicate a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.2% from 2025 to 2035. Anticipated to reach a value of $10.91 billion by 2035, the RLT market continues to show promising expansion.

data.title: BLS revises job growth for the 12 months ended March 2025; may impact Federal Reserve rate cut next week.
data.description: Revisions to job growth data by the Bureau of Labor Statistics over the 12 months leading up to March 2025 may influence the likelihood of a significant rate cut by the Federal Reserve in the upcoming week. The adjustments have slashed the job growth numbers before the implementation of tariffs by the Trump administration. This development is currently being covered comprehensively by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: DOGE price soars, up 40% in the week, surpassing Bitcoin and Ethereum. U.S. spot ETF launch approaching.
data.description: Dogecoin has experienced a significant rise of 40% within the week, largely attributed to an official treasury firm increasing its holdings of DOGE. Furthermore, excitement surrounds the imminent launch of the first U.S. spot ETF, contributing to the positive momentum of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Spectra Aerospace and Defense rebrands as Spectra Defense Technologies at DSEI conference, focusing on integrated C5ISR mission systems for warfighters.
data.description: Today at the DSEI conference in London, Spectra Aerospace and Defense unveiled their rebrand to Spectra Defense Technologies, now known as Spectra. This rebranding was announced at Booth S2-145 and signifies a significant shift in the company's direction to better align with the changing needs of defense operations. The new focus of Spectra is on providing integrated C5ISR mission systems to empower warfighters with critical information capabilities in response to the dynamic threat landscape of today. This transformation highlights the company's commitment to adapting to the demands of modern defense, forward-thinking strategies, and enhanced support for defense operations.

data.title: German exports to the US fell to their lowest level since 2021, dropping by 7.9% to €11.1 billion in July despite a forecasted increase of 2.5%.
data.description: Germany reported a 0.6% decrease in exports in July, falling to €130.2 billion, below the expected 2.5% increase. Exports to the US dropped by 7.9% to €11.1 billion, hitting the lowest level since 2021. The Ifo Institute revised its forecast for Germany's growth to 0.2% in 2025 and 1.3% in 2026 due to ongoing trade uncertainty. The EU-US trade deal, which locked in a 15% tariff on most EU exports to the US, has impacted German competitiveness despite avoiding a full-blown trade war. The US economy could slow by 0.7% due to inflation and lower consumer spending, affecting companies like McDonald's and Domino's. Germany's inability to recover from two years of contraction has led to a plummet in investor confidence.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures up, CPI data awaited after Oracle boosts Nvidia, GE Vernova buys; market sluggish.
data.description: On Wednesday, AI stocks experienced a surge, propelled by Oracle, particularly impacting Nvidia and GE Vernova which led the way in new purchases. Despite this positive development, overall market performance was underwhelming. Dow Jones Futures witnessed an increase, and investors are awaiting the release of CPI inflation data following Oracle's influencing of Nvidia and GE Vernova as attractive investment options.

data.title: Circle Pharma and Lilly partner to enhance AI/ML capabilities to develop new oral macrocycle therapies for cancers.
data.description: In SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, Calif., Circle Pharma, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on innovative targeted macrocycle therapeutics for challenging cancers, has revealed a partnership with Eli Lilly and Company. This agreement allows Circle Pharma to utilize Lilly TuneLab, an advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning platform intended to speed up the creation of new medications. This collaboration is anticipated to aid biotech companies in accessing potent drug development tools.

data.title: Democrats face challenges in refining economic message after poor 2024 election; focus on household debt.
data.description: After a disappointing performance in the 2024 election, Democrats are actively deliberating on how to improve their economic messaging. They are working to strategically refine and strengthen their approach to appeal to voters.

data.title: CIBC Innovation Banking gives $1.6M to Vasco for growth, innovation. Platform helps businesses plan sales & marketing goals.
data.description: CIBC Innovation Banking has recently granted a $1.6 million debt facility to Vasco, a Revenue Operations platform aimed at aligning revenue teams and optimizing strategies. This capital infusion is intended to aid Vasco in further developing their product and expanding their market reach. Through Vasco's platform, organizations can strategize growth initiatives, establish sales and marketing objectives, and track customer journeys.

data.title: PIMCO's ZROZ ETF surges 8.8% in 4 days amid Treasury yield drop after weak jobs report, outperforming SPY.
data.description: A long-duration Treasury bond ETF has seen an impressive surge of nearly 9% in just four trading sessions, a performance reminiscent of rallies seen during the 2020 pandemic panic and the deflationary scare of August 2024. Specifically, the PIMCO 25+ Year Zero Coupon U.S. Treasury Index ETF (NYSE: ZROZ) saw an 8.8% increase between Sept. 3 and Sept. 8. This surge was driven by a significant drop in Treasury yields following a weak U.S. jobs report, reigniting expectations of impending Federal Reserve rate cuts. On the day of the jobs report (Sept. 6), the fund experienced a substantial 2.7% spike, one of its most robust daily gains of 2025. In comparison, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) only saw a 1.3% increase over the same period, highlighting a rare and significant outperformance by bonds over equities – a trend not commonly seen since the pandemic. The unexpectedly weak August jobs report played a key role in reshaping market expectations, with only 22,000 jobs added during the period.

data.title: Sverica Capital invests in Raken, a construction software provider for project management, based in California.
data.description: In San Francisco, Sverica Capital Management LP revealed a significant investment in Raken, a construction industry-focused field management software company located in Carlsbad, California. The private equity firm's move signifies a strategic growth development for Raken, known for its platform offering daily progress reporting, time tracking, and safety measures. This investment is poised to enhance Raken's operations and expand its services to better serve its clients in the construction sector.

data.title: Economist analyzes economy using hard data showing slow growth: job openings<unemployed. Concerns rise about recession risk.
data.description: The author discusses various ways to interpret the state of the economy: hard economic data, soft economic data, the stock market, and personal biases. From the perspective of hard data, the economy is showing signs of slowing down with factors like job creation stagnating, personal consumption plateauing, and industrial production remaining flat. The ratio of job openings per unemployed person fell below 1:1 for the first time in four years, indicating a decrease in job opportunities. There is a concern about a potential economic downturn, as declining job openings may lead to higher unemployment rates. While the author is cautious about predicting a recession, they acknowledge the challenges in maintaining growth. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
